subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the cup of guidance! Give thanks unto the Almighty Lord that thou hast been delivered from error and darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام هدی شکر کن حضرت کبریا را که از ضلالت و ظلماء نجات یافتی و
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution
